content: Routing-quality slice: added final component-edge port slots. routeEdges now snaps multi-edge endpoints on the same node side to equal interior divisions of that side after repair/reselection, instead of only spacing from current coordinates. Over-bent routes with otherwise valid endpoint incidence are now eligible for candidate port reselection, then simplified again after final slot snapping so equal ports do not reintroduce doglegs. Added a regression test proving same-side ports land with uniform gaps. Verification: npx tsc --noEmit, npm test -- --run test/layout.test.ts test/render.test.ts test/edges.test.ts, npm test (228 passing), npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ was left untouched. Next: visually smoke localhost on the highlighted Local-first/Web Frontend regions and tune remaining parallel-lane spacing or label-following defects only where visible.
